parts.title: Upper Secondary English Teacher
prompts: Write a 200-word article in English about the impact of social media on teenagers for English 5 and create 5 comprehension questions focusing on main ideas and details. Generate a 150-word short story in English about a young person facing a moral dilemma for English 6 and write 4 questions that encourage students to analyze the character's motivations.
Create a 200-word text in English about the history of the English language for English 7 and develop 5 questions that test students' understanding of linguistic evolution and influences.

Write a 150-word news report in English about a recent environmental issue in an English-speaking country for English 5 and create 5 questions focusing on cause and effect. Generate a 200-word text in English about cultural diversity in London for English 6 and write 4 questions that encourage students to reflect on the benefits and challenges of multiculturalism.
Create a 150-word excerpt from a novel set in the United States during the 1960s for English 7 and develop 5 questions that focus on historical context and character development.

Write a 200-word article in English about the importance of learning a second language for English 5 and create 5 comprehension questions that test vocabulary and inference skills. Generate a 150-word text in English about a famous British festival for English 6 and write 4 questions that encourage students to identify cultural traditions and their significance.
Create a 200-word speech in English about gender equality delivered by a young activist for English 7 and develop 5 questions that focus on rhetorical devices and persuasive techniques.
Write a 150-word blog post in English about the effects of globalization on youth culture for English 5 and create 5 questions that test students' understanding of global influences. Writing

Create a writing task for English 5 where students write a 200-word essay about the advantages and disadvantages of online learning and provide 5 guiding questions to help them structure their essay. Generate a prompt for English 6 where students write a 250-word short story about a journey that changes the main character's perspective and give 4 examples of descriptive language they can use.
Write a task for English 7 where students write a 300-word argumentative essay about whether social media does more harm than good and provide 5 tips for constructing a strong argument.

Create a writing prompt for English 5 where students write a 200-word letter to a friend describing a memorable holiday in an English-speaking country and give 3 examples of informal language to include. Generate a task for English 6 where students write a 250-word review of a book or movie set in an English-speaking country and provide 5 questions to help them analyze the plot and themes.
Write a prompt for English 7 where students write a 300-word speech about the importance of protecting the environment and give 4 examples of persuasive techniques they can use.

Create a writing task for English 5 where students write a 200-word narrative about a day in the life of a teenager in the UK and provide 5 vocabulary words related to daily routines. Generate a prompt for English 6 where students write a 250-word article about the impact of technology on communication and give 4 examples of linking words to help them structure their text.
Write a task for English 7 where students write a 300-word analysis of a famous English poem and provide 5 questions to guide their interpretation of themes and literary devices.
Create a writing prompt for English 5 where students write a 200-word email to a teacher explaining why they missed a deadline and give 3 examples of polite expressions to use. Oral Communication

Write 5 discussion questions for English 5 based on a 200-word article about the effects of climate change in English-speaking countries and focus on solutions and individual responsibility. Generate a role-play scenario for English 6 where two students debate the pros and cons of studying abroad in an English-speaking country and provide 5 key phrases for expressing opinions.
Create a list of 5 topics for English 7 students to discuss in small groups about global issues affecting English-speaking nations and write 4 questions for each topic to guide the discussion.

Write a 150-word text in English for English 5 about a cultural misunderstanding between two people from different English-speaking countries and create 5 questions for a class discussion about cultural differences. Generate 5 debate topics for English 6 about modern challenges in English-speaking societies and provide 4 arguments for each side of one topic as an example.
Create a task for English 7 where students prepare a 3-minute presentation about a famous English-speaking historical figure and give 5 tips for effective public speaking.

Write 5 discussion questions for English 5 based on a 200-word text about the importance of diversity in schools and focus on inclusion and equality. Generate a group activity for English 6 where students discuss a 150-word text about the influence of British music globally and provide 5 questions to encourage critical thinking.
Create a task for English 7 where students prepare a 2-minute speech about the role of English as a global language and give 4 examples of rhetorical questions they can use.
Write a scenario for English 5 where students role-play a job interview in English and provide 5 common interview questions along with sample answers. Cultural Understanding

Write a 200-word text in English about the history of Thanksgiving in the United States for English 5 and create 5 questions that encourage students to reflect on cultural traditions. Generate a 150-word text in English about the impact of British colonialism on modern English-speaking countries for English 6 and write 4 questions that focus on historical and cultural effects.

Create a task for English 7 where students write a 300-word essay comparing a cultural festival in two English-speaking countries and provide 5 guiding questions to help them analyze similarities and differences.

Write a 200-word text in English about the influence of American pop culture on global youth for English 5 and create 5 discussion questions about cultural globalization. Generate a 150-word text in English about Indigenous cultures in Australia for English 6 and write 4 questions that encourage students to reflect on cultural preservation and challenges.
Create a task for English 7 where students research and present a 3-minute talk about a social issue in an English-speaking country and provide 5 questions to guide their research.

Write a 200-word text in English about the education system in the UK for English 5 and create 5 questions that encourage students to compare it with the Swedish system. Generate a 150-word text in English about the history of the English monarchy for English 6 and write 4 questions that focus on its cultural and political significance.
Create a task for English 7 where students write a 300-word analysis of a famous English-speaking author's work and its cultural context and provide 5 questions to guide their analysis.

Write a 200-word text in English about the role of sports in Australian culture for English 5 and create 5 questions that encourage students to discuss the importance of sports in society. Literature and Analysis

Write a 200-word excerpt from a dystopian novel set in a future English-speaking society for English 7 and create 5 questions that encourage students to analyze themes and symbolism. Generate a 150-word summary of Shakespeare's Romeo and Juliet for English 6 and write 4 questions that focus on the characters' motivations and the play's cultural impact.
Create a 200-word text in English about the themes of identity in Toni Morrison's Beloved for English 7 and develop 5 questions that encourage students to explore historical and social contexts.

Write a 150-word poem in English about freedom for English 5 and create 5 questions that help students analyze the poem's imagery and tone. Generate a 200-word text in English about the role of nature in Romantic poetry for English 6 and write 4 questions that focus on literary devices and historical background.

Create a task for English 7 where students write a 300-word analysis of a short story by an English-speaking author and provide 5 guiding questions to help them explore themes and narrative techniques.

Write a 150-word excerpt from a novel about the American Dream for English 6 and create 5 questions that encourage students to discuss the concept's relevance today. Generate a 200-word text in English about the influence of Charles Dickens on modern literature for English 7 and write 4 questions that focus on his social commentary and writing style.
Create a 150-word summary of George Orwell's 1984 for English 6 and develop 5 questions that encourage students to reflect on surveillance and power in today's society.

Write a 200-word text in English about the role of female characters in Jane Austen's novels for English 7 and create 5 questions that focus on gender roles and societal expectations. Language Development

Create a list of 10 advanced English idioms related to emotions and give a task for English 6 where students write a 200-word story using at least 3 idioms. Generate 5 sentences in English with common grammatical errors for English 5 and create a task where students correct the errors and explain their reasoning.
Write a 150-word text in English with 5 examples of formal language for English 7 and create a task where students rewrite the text using informal language.

Create a list of 10 English phrasal verbs related to communication and give a task for English 6 where students write 5 sentences using different phrasal verbs. Generate a 200-word text in English with 5 examples of academic vocabulary for English 7 and write 4 questions that encourage students to use the vocabulary in their own sentences.
Create a task for English 5 where students write a 200-word dialogue between two friends using at least 5 slang expressions and provide a list of 10 slang terms they can choose from.

Write a 150-word text in English with 5 examples of linking words for English 6 and create a task where students write a short essay using at least 3 of the linking words. Generate a list of 10 English words with multiple meanings and give a task for English 5 where students write sentences showing the different meanings of 3 words.
Create a 200-word text in English with 5 examples of passive voice for English 7 and write 4 questions that encourage students to rewrite the sentences in active voice.
Write a task for English 6 where students improve a 150-word text by adding descriptive adjectives and adverbs and provide 10 examples of descriptive words they can use. Social Issues

Write a 200-word article in English about the impact of immigration on English-speaking countries for English 6 and create 5 discussion questions focusing on social and economic effects. Generate a 150-word text in English about the Black Lives Matter movement for English 7 and write 4 questions that encourage students to reflect on systemic racism and activism.
Create a task for English 5 where students write a 200-word essay about the effects of poverty in an English-speaking country and provide 5 guiding questions to help them structure their essay.

Write a 200-word speech in English about the importance of mental health awareness for English 6 and create 5 questions that encourage students to discuss societal attitudes toward mental health. Generate a 150-word text in English about the gender pay gap in the UK for English 7 and write 4 questions that focus on causes, consequences, and potential solutions.
Create a task for English 5 where students prepare a 2-minute presentation about a social issue in an English-speaking country and provide 5 research questions to guide their preparation.

Write a 200-word article in English about the effects of Brexit on young people for English 6 and create 5 questions that encourage students to discuss political and cultural impacts. Generate a 150-word text in English about the opioid crisis in the United States for English 7 and write 4 questions that focus on public health and government responses.
Create a list of 5 social issues affecting English-speaking countries and give a task for English 5 where students write a 200-word letter to a politician about one issue.

Write a 200-word text in English about the role of education in reducing inequality for English 6 and create 5 discussion questions about access to education and its societal impact. Creativity and Expression

Create a writing prompt for English 5 where students write a 200-word poem about a city in an English-speaking country and provide 5 examples of sensory language they can use. Generate a task for English 6 where students write a 250-word script for a short scene set in a historical period in an English-speaking country and give 4 examples of period-specific language.
Write a prompt for English 7 where students create a 300-word fictional interview with a famous English-speaking celebrity and provide 5 questions they can include in the interview.

Create a task for English 5 where students write a 200-word story inspired by a famous English proverb and provide a list of 5 proverbs they can choose from. Generate a prompt for English 6 where students write a 250-word diary entry from the perspective of a teenager living in an English-speaking country during a major historical event and give 4 historical details to include.
Write a task for English 7 where students create a 300-word advertisement for a fictional product aimed at English-speaking youth and provide 5 examples of persuasive language to use.

Create a writing prompt for English 5 where students write a 200-word description of a festival in an English-speaking country and provide 5 vocabulary words related to celebrations. Generate a task for English 6 where students write a 250-word alternate ending to a famous English novel and give 4 examples of how to maintain the original tone and style.
Write a prompt for English 7 where students create a 300-word podcast script about a cultural trend in an English-speaking country and provide 5 tips for engaging the audience.
Create a task for English 5 where students write a 200-word story about a magical object found in an English-speaking country and provide 5 descriptive words to inspire their writing.
